## Review Type

- [ ] Structured beta review in `review_notes/`
- [ ] Documentation fix
- [ ] Bug fix for public review tooling

## Safety Check

- [ ] I did not include private prompts, proprietary code, API keys, customer data, private paths, or private repository names.
- [ ] I understand this repo does not include the private CodeMani materializer.

## Summary

Describe what you changed or reviewed.
